message:
fix(deps): update agentdb to 2.0.0-alpha.3.5, resolve glob deprecation

- Updates agentdb from ^2.0.0-alpha.3.4 to ^2.0.0-alpha.3.5
- agentdb 2.0.0-alpha.3.5 removes sqlite3 (which pulled in node-gyp with deprecated glob)
- Removes 79 unnecessary packages from dependency chain
- Runs npm audit fix to resolve remaining vulnerabilities
- All vulnerabilities now resolved (0 found)

Resolves glob@10.5.0 deprecation warning

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Built by @ruvnet with Claude Agent SDK, neural networks, memory persistence, GitHub integration, and distributed consensus protocols.",
